final:
module up_counter (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            if (count == 4'b1111) begin
                count <= 4'b0000;
            end else begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (enable) begin
        if (count != 4'b1111) begin
          count <= count - 1;
        end
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
